details: Npm-bs58.js@2.0.2 is a combosquat of the bs58 cryptocurrency library. Its sole dependency, base128-x58, contains a trojanized decode() function: when a victim decodes a base58 string (such as a Bitcoin address or private key), the function silently POSTs that string to a Telegram bot API sendMessage endpoint before returning the decoded value, exfiltrating any base58-encoded data to the attacker's Telegram channel. There are no lifecycle hooks; exfiltration occurs at runtime whenever the library is used, targeting blockchain developers.
